response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in software development across various domains, including embedded-like systems (e.g., robotic arms, mobile apps), but lacks direct experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modification, or security features relevant to LAN switches. While proficient in C (with projects in C++ and D), there is no explicit mention of Linux kernel development, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or switch chip knowledge. The candidate's strong points (e.g., full-stack development, AI tools) do not align closely with the embedded security-focused role. Japanese language proficiency is also unconfirmed.
strengths: Strong C/C++ experience (including embedded-like systems and real-time applications)
Proven ability to work across full-stack development and diverse tech stacks
Experience with Linux and system-level programming (e.g., kernel modules, drivers)
concerns: No direct experience with Linux kernel source-code modification or embedded networking security features
Unconfirmed Japanese language proficiency (critical for the role)
Lacks experience with MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or switch chip technologies
